title: useContext Hook
description: Consume context values in function components with useContext.

slides.title: Consuming Context 🍽️
Updating Context

quizData.question: What does `useContext(MyContext)` return?

options.text: An object with Provider and Consumer

quizData.explanation: useContext returns the current value from the nearest Provider.

slides.title: Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content: You can create custom hooks like `useUser` that encapsulate `useContext(UserContext)` for cleaner code.
